nodes.name: AtlasStudio Foundation
nodes.summary: Established the AtlasStudio repository, vision, workflow, agent roles, and work order format.

nodes.name: Last Sword Protocol Story Reset
nodes.summary: Resets the Last Sword Protocol story foundation for the overworld-first JRPG direction.

nodes.name: Home Region Overworld Design
nodes.summary: Designs the starting home region (Ashford Vale) as an overworld-first JRPG region.

nodes.name: Agent Assignment System
nodes.summary: Defines how work orders are matched and assigned to agents.

nodes.name: RPG Maker Bridge Design
nodes.summary: Designs the bridge that translates engine-independent design into RPG Maker MZ implementation work.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Architecture
nodes.summary: Designs the Atlas Graph shared memory layer and seeds the initial graph files.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Validation and Query Tools
nodes.summary: Implements the first stdlib Atlas Graph validation and query scripts.

nodes.name: Studio Doctor
nodes.summary: Builds the first AtlasStudio diagnostic command and readable Studio Health report.

nodes.name: Graph Diff Engine
nodes.summary: Implements the Atlas Graph diff engine that explains changes between two graph states.

nodes.name: Immutable Formatting Guard
nodes.summary: Implements a check-only guard that warns about suspicious broad graph JSON formatting churn.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Validator
nodes.summary: Validates Atlas Graph JSON files for parseability, required fields, unique IDs, edge references, and source paths.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Query
nodes.summary: Queries Atlas Graph JSON files for nodes, relationships, paths, work-order impact, statuses, orphans, and missing sources.

nodes.name: Studio Doctor
nodes.summary: Reports AtlasStudio project health across graph integrity, orphans, missing sources, work orders, and implementation readiness.

nodes.name: Atlas Graph Diff Engine
nodes.summary: Compares Atlas Graph states between Git refs, commits, or directories and reports added, removed, and changed facts by scope.

nodes.name: Immutable Formatting Guard
nodes.summary: Checks graph JSON diffs for formatting-only changes, semantic changes, and suspicious broad formatting churn without rewriting files.

nodes.name: GPT
nodes.summary: Story and creative systems agent role.

nodes.name: Claude Code
nodes.summary: Senior software architect and implementation agent role.

nodes.name: Codex
nodes.summary: Implementation and local verification agent role.

nodes.name: Human
nodes.summary: Human creator, reviewer, and final approver.
